title: Ron Carucci on Power, Leadership, and Persuasion
summary: Ron Carucci — author, Forbes contributor, and co-founder of Navalent — on the dynamics of power inside organisations, what real leadership looks like under pressure, and how to persuade without manipulation.
full_content_text: Ron Carucci — author, Forbes contributor, and co-founder of Navalent — on the dynamics of power inside organisations, what real leadership looks like under pressure, and how to persuade without manipulation.
